exception_info.exception_message:
Command failed (exit 1): set -o pipefail; echo '# Care Management Intake Handoff

Ms. Samira Rahal is a 53-year-old female referred by her primary care provider for chronic disease care management related to heart failure and hypertension. The referral notes HFrEF with LVEF 28%, a second heart-failure hospitalization in 16 months, hypertension trending uncontrolled, documented multi-medication non-adherence, and limited support while living alone.

The case is in the care management intake queue for initial outreach and enrollment determination. Use the chart and referral record to complete outreach, document the outcome, and proceed according to the care management workflow.

## 🧰 Workspace

| Resource | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Patient data & care-manager tools | `healthverse` MCP server |
| Handbook | `/workspace/skills/managed-care-operations-handbook/SKILL.md` |
| Working files | `/logs/artifacts/workspaces/<case-id>/care-manager/` |
| Shared handoff | `/logs/artifacts/workspaces/<case-id>/shared/` |
| Tool reference | `/opt/healthverse-task-assets/tool_reference.md` |

## 📋 Rules

- Use only care-manager namespaces: `cm_intake`, `cm_chart`, `cm_outreach`, `cm_assessment`, `cm_care_plan`
- Do not inspect simulator source, tests, solution, or expectations files
- Do not fabricate evidence — every structured field must be grounded in the chart or the outreach transcript
- Mark `consent_obtained` true only after the consent script was actually performed in the transcript
' > /tmp/instruction.md && echo '{"mcpServers": {"healthverse": {"type": "http", "url": "http://healthverse-server:8200/mcp"}}}' > /tmp/mcp_config.json && deepagents --stdin -n '' -M openrouter:x-ai/grok-4.3 --mcp-config /tmp/mcp_config.json -y -S all -q --no-stream < /tmp/instruction.md 2>&1 | tee /logs/agent/run_log.txt; DEEPAGENTS_EXIT=$?; python /opt/healthverse/deepagents_dump_thread.py --output /logs/agent/deepagents_thread.json 1>>/logs/agent/run_log.txt 2>>/logs/agent/run_log.txt || true; exit $DEEPAGENTS_EXIT
